name: Analytics overview dashboard
description: Implement the analytics overview dashboard. Backend: GET /api/v1/analytics/overview?period=YYYY-MM (returns: total spend for period, spend by day time-series, top-5 categories by spend with amount and percent, total expense count). All aggregates respect visibility rules — private expenses excluded from household totals. Frontend: Analytics/Insights page — period selector (default current month), total spend hero number, spend-over-time line or bar chart, category breakdown pie/bar chart with ranked list. Per docs/product-specs/analytics-overview.md. Does NOT require budget data (feat-027 is NOT a dependency) — analytics is pure expense aggregation. Does NOT include month-over-month comparison or group breakdowns (feat-029).
